violations.text: Old rodent droppings were observed behind boxes next to the walk-in. Area to be cleaned. Grease was observed underneath equipment in the the kitchen. Floor to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
A box of sugar was observed with rodent droppings on top of it. Box was open. Box was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Raw animal foods (beef and eggs_ were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Handout provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
Potatoes and single service containers were observed stored on the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine in the back has an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
Old rodent droppings were observed in the kitchen next to the 3-bay sink and under the prep table near the entrance of the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
A can of pineapple juice was observed with rodent droppings. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of item at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener moved to ware-washing area at the time of inspection to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the ware-washing, back storage, and bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Person in charge to routinely clean and monitor affected areas daily. Pest control recommended to increase bi-weekly until rodent activity is resolved. Plan of action for eliminating rodent activity to be developed and implemented by person in charge. Plan of action and pest control reports to be sent to inspector by 3/4/23. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The floors under the cooking equipmentt have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The floors throughout the facility were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
